footer.text: Character Guide • Synergy: Varka | Update Date: 02/27/2026 | Editor: ._.samantha._.

fields.name: Notes:
fields.value:
Teammate suggestions are in order of recommendation. Varka needs at least one other Anemo, and two Pyro, Electro, Cryo or Hydro characters, and is strongly recommended to run a Pyro or Hydro team including a Hexerei teammate.

__Anemo Options__: Venti, Sucrose, Kazuha, Faruzan, Jean, Ifa, Kazuha, Lynette, Lanyan

__Pryo Options__: Bennett, Durin, Xiangling, Thoma, Mavuika, C2 Klee, C6 Chevreuse, Dehya

__Electro Options__: Fischl, Iansan, Kujou Sara, Beidou, Yae Miko, Kuki Shinobu, Lisa

__Cryo Options__: Escoffier, Shenhe, Citlali, C4 Ayaka, Ganyu (AoE), Layla, Chongyun, Mika, Charlotte, Diona, Kaeya, Rosaria

__Hydro Options__: Furina, Yelan, Mona

__Hexerei Buff Options:__ Venti, Durin, Sucrose, Mona, Fischl

__Ascendent Gleam:__ Columbina + Ineffa
